examples: It makes sense to buy at dealer prices so you can maximize your profits if you resell.
Staff members of a luxury brand may buy its old stock at cheaper prices, but they are not allowed to resell them.
When customers do want to toss their pair, they can give them back to the store, which will repurpose and resell them.
Once the WLAN is in place, the operator can allow Joltage and Boingo to resell access.
People relied on cunning, often stealing--not just lightbulbs but chickens, vegetables and soap--to resell.
